title: Joensuu, North Karelia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Joensuu, North Karelia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Joensuu is a city in North Karelia with a population of 76,000. A university city in the Finnish Lakeland, known for its proximity to Koli National Park and Orthodox heritage.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
